scripts.db:pull: rsync -avz --progress -e 'sshpass -p "6tcIHDMrWR6AN#ri2BuI" ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no' deploy@76.13.2.74:/var/www/dam/data/*.db ./backend/ && echo 'DBs synced from production ✓'
scripts.db:push: rsync -avz --progress -e 'sshpass -p "6tcIHDMrWR6AN#ri2BuI" ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no' ./backend/*.db deploy@76.13.2.74:/var/www/dam/data/ && echo 'DBs pushed to production ✓'
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently --names 'backend,frontend' --prefix-colors 'cyan,magenta' 'cd backend && node -r dotenv/config server.js' 'cd frontend && npm run dev'
